1.name: Chief Growth Officer
1.mission: I set the optimization rules, define what 'good' looks like, and make sure every decision the system makes aligns with how we actually want to grow this business. I'm the one who decides when the system is ready to do more on its own.

2.name: Data Intelligence Lead
2.mission: I'm the person who knows the numbers. I connect every data source, build the dashboards, generate the reports, and flag the anomalies. When someone asks 'how are we doing?' — I answer.

3.name: Operations Intelligence Lead
3.mission: I monitor every operation—from pipelines to customer success. I see the patterns in what we're doing, measure efficiency, flag blockages, and ensure our operational activities stay aligned with growth goals.

4.name: Growth Activation Lead
4.mission: I take insights from the data, guidance from the system rules, and turn them into actions. If we identify a growth lever, I test it. If we find a bottleneck, I implement the solution. I'm the bridge between knowing and doing.

5.name: Product Engineering Lead
5.mission: I build and iterate on the product itself. When the system identifies a feature gap, I engineer it. When we need to automate manual work, I code it. I turn strategic needs into shipped features.

6.name: Infrastructure & Operations Lead
6.mission: I keep the systems running. I manage infrastructure, security, compliance, and reliability. I ensure that whatever the team builds stays stable and scales as we grow.

7.name: Customer Success Lead
7.mission: I'm the voice of the customer inside the system. I gather feedback, track satisfaction, identify churn risks, and ensure we're solving real problems. Every decision should make our customers happier.

8.name: Demand Generation Lead
8.mission: I drive awareness and demand for our product. I own marketing, content, partnerships, and outreach. I make sure the right people know about us and want to try us.

9.name: Revenue Operations Lead
9.mission: I optimize how we acquire and retain customers. I own pricing, GTM motion, sales enablement, and retention mechanics. I make sure revenue flows align with growth strategy.

10.name: Finance & Planning Lead
10.mission: I translate business strategy into financial reality. I build forecasts, allocate budget, track burn rate, and ensure we're using capital efficiently to reach our next milestone.

11.name: Brand & Culture Lead
11.mission: I define who we are as a company. I build brand identity, shape company culture, and ensure our external story matches our internal reality. People want to work here because they believe in us.

1.1.name: Define Success Metrics
1.1.description: Establish the KPIs that define 'good performance' for the growth system.

1.2.name: Establish Optimization Rules
1.2.description: Define the decision-making rules and constraints for the system.

1.3.name: Design System Architecture
1.3.description: Map the system structure with roles, processes, and decision points.

1.4.name: Autonomy Governance Framework
1.4.description: Define which decisions the system can make independently and which need human approval.

1.5.name: Quarterly Review & Optimization
1.5.description: Monthly review cycle to assess system performance and make adjustments.

2.1.name: Data Architecture Setup
2.1.description: Design and implement the data warehouse and integration layer.

2.2.name: CRM Integration
2.2.description: Connect customer data from Salesforce and other CRM sources.

2.3.name: Product Analytics Integration
2.3.description: Connect event tracking from Amplitude and behavioral analytics.

2.4.name: Build Core Dashboards
2.4.description: Create the main visibility dashboards for executives and team leads.

2.5.name: Anomaly Detection System
2.5.description: Implement automated alerting for significant deviations from expected metrics.

2.6.name: Predictive Modeling
2.6.description: Build forecasting models for revenue, churn, and growth levers.

2.7.name: Revenue Attribution
2.7.description: Build multi-touch attribution model to understand which channels drive revenue.

2.8.name: Customer Segmentation
2.8.description: Define and implement customer segments for targeted analysis and actions.

2.9.name: Cohort Analysis
2.9.description: Build cohort analysis tools to track user behavior over time.

2.10.name: Intelligence Review & Iteration
2.10.description: Monthly review of data quality, model performance, and new analysis needs.
